name: Trump Searching Vigaro
short_description: President Putin has captured other big country president Trump all Vigaro pills. So Trump need find missing 10 vigaro pills. Play this awesome 2d platformer
detailed_description:
STORY:

President Putin has captured President Trump all 11 vigaro pills, which he needs to survive in his lifeactions . So play this awesome 2d platformer and try to find all pills in 11 different levels. There is few different traps like moving chainsaws and moving spikes. Those kill player immediately. Then there are bombs which will reduce player health. Also hitting lava will kill player immediately and respawn player to level start. Every level player has 5 lives.

There are also jumping and moving platforms. Also some levels there are doors which need key to open. Keys are hidden somewhere in levels. So can you be brave president Trump and find all necessary pills.

FEATURES:

  • 11 different levels.

  • Health system

  • Hitting to lava kill player immediately

  • Collect more lifes

  • Traps: moving chainsaws, moving spikes, bombs

  • Steam achievements

DISCLAIMER

This game is a work of fiction. Names, characters, places and events are the products of the authors’ imagination. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, or actual events is purely coincidental.
